examples: That will only stifle your creativity and could make your writing seem dry and unoriginal.
He called the new building unoriginal and said that it merely aped the classical traditions.
I've read a lot of advice telling me not to bore people with cliched, unoriginal conversation topics.
That would put it behind the other (unoriginal) movie hitting theaters this weekend, Spy Kids 4.
Which means no more granting of patents to things that are clear and obvious and entirely unoriginal.
